svg.title: Measured cup-stack heights with two competing model lines
svg.desc: Axes with number of cups across and stack height in centimeters up. Three measured points sit at two cups eleven centimeters, four cups thirteen centimeters, and six cups fifteen centimeters. A dashed line labeled model A rises from the origin. A solid line labeled model B starts near nine centimeters on the height axis and rises gently through the region of the points.
